page.title: Configure Bipper
page.description: Meshtastic and Gaulix pager settings for the Seeed Wio Tracker L1 Pro.
page.notBipperWarning: The connected device does not appear to be a Bipper L1 — Gaulix settings may not apply.
page.saveHint: The Identity tab uses the Save button at the top. T1–T4 tag values are applied immediately.

gaulix.title: Gaulix pager
gaulix.description: T1–T4 = up to 4 membership entities. Alert format: `#alerte <text> #affiliation`.
gaulix.notConnected: Connect a Bipper via USB or Bluetooth to configure the Gaulix pager.

status.title: Pager status
status.empty: Click Refresh to query the pager (#status).

tag.title: Entity membership (T1–T4)
tag.description: Up to 4 entities per Bipper (e.g. T1=SDIS42, T2=DEPT42, T3=Test, T4=UDIOM42). Leave empty to leave a slot unused. T1=all receives everything.
tag.hint: Example: `#alerte fire #test` → buzzes if T1–T4 contains test (or all). `#info message #SDIS42` = 3 beeps, no full-screen.

beep.title: Beep count (legacy)
beep.description: Stored in NVS (#b N). Alert sound remains continuous pim-pom.
beep.label: Count (0 = continuous)

send.pageTitle: Send Alert, Info and Vigilance on the Gaulix bipper network
send.pageDescription: Build `#alerte|#secours|#vigilance|#info|#fin <text> #affiliation` then send on Alerte channel or as DM.
send.affiliationHint: Checked on receive against the Bipper T1–T4 slots.

needText.title: Text required
needText.description: Enter alert text, or choose Fin.

needNode.title: Node required
needNode.description: Select a node for direct send.

noAlerteChannel.title: Alerte channel missing
noAlerteChannel.description: No channel named Alerte on the connected node.

notConnected.title: Not connected
notConnected.description: No active node to send pager commands.
